summary: Social Signals for Degens: a crypto social trading app (React + Motoko) that turns a Farcaster network into an alpha feed. Core features include wallet connection, live feed of token trading activity from social graph wallets, in-app notifications for trusted contact trades on Monad Testnet, and action buttons (View on DEX, Add to Watchlist, Copy Trade). Currently scoping down to trading activity feed and watchlist first.
architectural_notes: Integrates with Farcaster social graph for contact discovery
Targets Monad Testnet for on-chain trade activity
known_issues: Initial full build failed; scoping down to trading activity feed and watchlist first
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Neon degen-style logo mark with a signal/waveform motif in green and magenta on a near-black background (social-signals-logo.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Build a Trading Activity Feed page as the main view. Fetch trading events from the backend and display each as a card showing: social handle, wallet address (truncated), token symbol and name, BUY/SELL badge (color-coded green/red), amount, price in USD, network label ('Monad Testnet'), and relative timestamp. Each card must include an 'Add to Watchlist' button and a 'View on DEX' button (opens a placeholder external URL).

Build a Watchlist page accessible via a nav tab. Display all tokens saved to the watchlist fetched from the backend. Each watchlist entry shows token symbol, token name, and a 'Remove' button that calls the backend removeFromWatchlist function. Show an empty state message when the watchlist is empty.

Apply a degen-crypto visual theme throughout the app: near-black dark background, neon green and magenta/pink accent colors, monospace or bold sans-serif typography, glowing card borders, and a terminal-inspired grid layout. Include a top navigation bar with the app name 'Social Signals' and tabs for 'Feed' and 'Watchlist'. Render the generated logo asset (social-signals-logo.dim_256x256.png) from frontend/public/assets/generated in the nav bar.

new_feature_requests.summary: Live trading activity feed from Farcaster social graph wallets on Monad Testnet
In-app notifications when trusted contacts make trades
Action buttons: View on DEX, Add to Watchlist, Copy Trade

Create a backend actor that stores a list of mock trading activity events, each with fields: walletAddress (Text), tokenSymbol (Text), tokenName (Text), action (Text: 'BUY' or 'SELL'), amount (Float), priceUSD (Float), network (Text: 'Monad Testnet'), timestamp (Int), and socialHandle (Text). Pre-populate with at least 8 realistic mock entries. Expose a query function to return all events sorted by timestamp descending.

Create a backend actor capability to manage a user watchlist: a list of tokens identified by tokenSymbol (Text) and tokenName (Text). Expose update functions to add a token to the watchlist and remove a token from the watchlist, and a query function to retrieve the current watchlist. Prevent duplicate entries by tokenSymbol.
